category: Essential Elements of a Non-Musical Stage Play
explanation: Actor, Director, Script, and Set Design are all fundamental roles or components in the production of a non-musical stage play. A Conductor is primarily associated with musical performances or orchestras.
Concrete, Aqueducts, Roman Roads, and Arches are all significant engineering and architectural achievements attributed to or highly developed by the Roman Empire. Gunpowder was invented in China.
Erode, Wither, Deplete, and Shrink all describe a process of becoming less, smaller, or decaying. Amplify, however, means to increase or intensify.
